name: Meatloaf in Puff Pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ground meats with bacon, shallot, olive oil, herbs, and spices. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Stir in egg to blend well.
3. Roll out dough into 1/4 inch thickness.
4. Place half the meat mixture in the center of dough.
5. Place prunes along the center.
6. Place rest of meat on top, giving it the shape of a loaf.
7. Wrap dough around meatloaf and place seam side down on baking pan.
8. Make a chimney in the center using strips of leftover dough.
9. Brush with egg yolk.
10. Bake in a preheated 400°F oven for 25 minutes.
11. Reduce heat to 300°F and continue baking another 35 minutes.
